segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Did the detectives save the diamonds?
The plane was late, and detectives were waiting at the airport all morning.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机晚点了，侦探们在机场等了整整一个上午。

segments.text: They were expecting a valuable parcel of diamonds from South Africa.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们正等着一包从南非来的贵重钻石。

segments.text: A few hours earlier, someone had told the police that thieves would try to steal the diamonds.

translations.zh-Hans: 几小时前，有人向警方报告，说小偷企图盗走这些钻石。

segments.text: When the plane arrived, some of the detectives were waiting inside the main building while others were waiting on the airfield.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机到达时，一些侦探守候在主楼内，另一些则守候在停机坪上。

segments.text: Two men took the parcel off the plane and carried it into the customs house.

translations.zh-Hans: 两个人从飞机上取下包裹，把它搬进海关。

segments.text: While two detectives were keeping guard at the door, two others opened the parcel.

translations.zh-Hans: 两名侦探在门口守卫，另外两名打开了包裹。

segments.text: To their surprise, the precious parcel was full of stones and sand.

translations.zh-Hans: 令他们吃惊的是，那个珍贵的包裹里装的全是石头和沙子。
